prompt:
A tasting notebook open to a structured notes page with small rating dots and short lines (all illegible), next to a few unlabeled sample cups and a small spoon on a clean kitchen-lab counter. A simple timer and a glass of water sit nearby, suggesting a blind sweetness test without any readable labels.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future home lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean surfaces, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the notebook and sample cups centered and uncluttered for icon clarity.
